ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "post_code" TEXT /* Postcode of the property */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property type */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "no_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bedrooms in the property */,
  "no_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "reception_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of reception rooms in the property */,
  "garden_size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the garden size */,
  "date_on_market" TEXT /* Date the property was put on the market */,
  "asking_price" REAL /* Asking price of the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "property_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property (e.g., Excellent, Good, Fair, Poor) */,
  "energy_efficiency" TEXT /* Energy efficiency rating (e.g., A, B, C, D, E, F, G) */,
  "garage" INTEGER /* Number of garages or parking spaces */,
  "basement" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the property has a basement */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the real estate agent managing the property */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  "image_urls" TEXT /* JSON array of image URLs for the property */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the property listing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_garden_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("garden_size_id") REFERENCES garden_sizes ("garden_size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES property_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the property type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the property type */,
  "average_size" REAL /* Average size of properties of this type (in square meters) */,
  "common_features" TEXT /* JSON array of common features for properties of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "average_property_price" REAL /* Average property price in the location */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* JSON array of amenities available in the location (e.g., schools, parks, shops) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "garden_sizes" (
  "garden_size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each garden size */,
  "garden_size_name" TEXT /* Name of the garden size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the garden size */,
  "average_size_sqm" REAL /* Average size of gardens of this type in square meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("garden_size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being sold */,
  "date_sold" TEXT /* Date the property was sold */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Sale price of the property */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer */,
  "buyer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "buyer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent who made the sale */,
  "commission" REAL /* Commission earned by the agent on the sale */,
  "sales_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "agents" (
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each agent */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the agent */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the agent */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the agent */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the agent was hired */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the agent */,
  "performance_rating" TEXT /* Performance rating of the agent (e.g., Excellent, Good, Fair, Poor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being viewed */,
  "date_viewed" TEXT /* Date the property was viewed */,
  "view_type" TEXT /* Type of view (e.g., physical, online) */,
  "viewer_name" TEXT /* Name of the person viewing the property */,
  "viewer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the viewer */,
  "viewer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the viewer */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent showing the property */,
  "view_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the view */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_property_views_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being offered on */,
  "date_made" TEXT /* Date the offer was made */,
  "offer_price" REAL /* Price of the offer */,
  "offer_status" TEXT /* Status of the offer (e.g., Accepted, Rejected, Pending) */,
  "buyer_name" TEXT /* Name of the buyer making the offer */,
  "buyer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the buyer */,
  "buyer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the buyer */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the agent handling the offer */,
  "offer_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the offer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES agents ("agent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., agent, manager, admin) */,
  "date_registered" TEXT /* Date the user registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., Active, Inactive, Suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user being granted permission */,
  "permission_type" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "date_granted" TEXT /* Date the permission was granted */,
  "expired" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the permission has expired */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the permission expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
